profile.title: Account Settings
profile.description: Manage your personal profile data and account details here

personalInfo.title: Personal Identity Information
personalInfo.description: This information will be shown to other users in the projects and teams you are assigned to.

passwordChange.title: Security
passwordChange.description: Update your password regularly to keep your account secure.

notifications.error: An error occurred while changing the password.

fields.msalWarning: Users who signed in with Microsoft can only update their username.

notifications.updateError: An error occurred while updating the profile.

dangerZone.title: Delete Account
dangerZone.description: Use this section if you want to permanently delete your data and account.
dangerZone.irreversibleWarning: This action cannot be undone and all your data will be lost.

deleteModal.title: Delete Account
deleteModal.requestDescription: Please enter your password to initiate the process.
deleteModal.emailSentMessage: Please check your email inbox. We've sent you a confirmation link to complete the account deletion process. The link will expire after a certain period.
deleteModal.validationErrorMessage: The deletion confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new deletion link from your profile settings.
deleteModal.confirmNormalMessage: You can now permanently delete your account by clicking the button below.

errors.emptyPassword: Please enter your password or authenticator.
errors.requestFailed: Deletion request failed (Password may be incorrect).
errors.confirmFailed: Account deletion could not be confirmed or the token has expired.

success.accountDeleted: Your account has been successfully deleted. Redirecting...

team.selectUserWarning: Please select a user from the list.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
